Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Katharine Banner. Author.

  • Christian Stratton. Author.

  • Kathryn Irvine. Author.

Citation

Oram J, Banner K, Stratton C, Irvine K (2026). ValidationExplorer: Simulation-Based Tools for Bioacoustic Study Design with the Count-Detection Model. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://j-oram.github.io/ValidationExplorer/. 

@Manual{,
